TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mohamed Ould Ghazouani Mohamed Ould Ghazouani (ryax sa 4 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1956 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Mauritania ta' misuw hya' ga Mohamed Ould Ghazouani, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mohamed Ould Ghazouani minkahul sa Boumdeid, Assaba Region na Mauritania. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1956 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
S.PHON: mońßame* oul* …£ńßazouani mońßame* oul* …£ńßazouani (rjax s~…ēa * na ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēqu kawas~…ē na **** - mis~…ēuw ), ńßja …£a s~…ēquliq na pklańßaŇč …£a…£a. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw mauritania ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mońßame* oul* …£ńßazouani, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral mońßame* oul* …£ńßazouani minkańßul s~…ēa ő≤oum*ei*, as~…ēs~…ēaő≤a re…£ion na mauritania. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun
S.FORM: Mohamed Ould Ghazouani Mohamed Ould Ghazouani (ryax sa 4 na byacing tay 12 squ kawas na 1956 - misuw ), hya ga squliq na pklahang gaga. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Mauritania ta' misuw hya' ga Mohamed Ould Ghazouani, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mohamed Ould Ghazouani minkahul sa Boumdeid, Assaba Region na Mauritania. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1956 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun
